reviews.comment:
Buena estacion, solo combustibles líquidos. Los baños estan bien y el shop tiene variedad de productos.
Estaria bueno que agreguen mas lugares para estacionar, ya que generalmente es un lugar muy concurrido.

(Translated by Google)
Good station, only liquid fuels. The restrooms are fine and the shop has a variety of products. It would be good if they added more parking spaces, as it's usually very busy.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHNWRPOWFREAE

reviews.comment:
como todas las ypf del ACA, excelente servicio, limpieza e instalaciones

Like all YPF stations in the ACA network, excellent service, cleanliness and facilities.

reviews.comment:
Tiene detrás de la estación de servicio un amplio lugar para descansar con hermosas arboledas...

(Translated by Google)
Behind the gas station, there's a large area to rest with beautiful groves of trees...

reviews.comment:
Baños siempre impecables, excelente servicio de playa. El bar cierra 20 hs, mal para los socios que pagamos  una cuota cara y para los ruteros nocturnos.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always spotless, and the beach service is excellent. The bar closes at 8 pm, which is bad for members who pay a high fee and for night owls.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbVpIYy1nRRAB
